title: Company Index
description: Phase 8 addition, closing a gap Phase 7 logged in IMPROVEMENT_BACKLOG.md ('content/companies/index.json has no schemas/company_index.schema.json counterpart'). Regenerated by scripts/update_company_index.py (called from scripts/reconcile_run.py, alongside the sibling content/cards/index.json regeneration) from every content/companies/<id>.json full profile on disk. Deliberately NOT the same shape as schemas/company.schema.json's own full-profile record -- this is the summary manifest the map homepage's marker list (site/builders/map.py) and the /companies/ index page read: id/name/hq_country/hq_city/hq_lat/hq_lng/status only, never the fuller profile.* fields.

companies.description: One entry per content/companies/<id>.json full profile currently on disk, alphabetical by id (not schema-enforced, but scripts/update_company_index.py's own convention).
